name: @wafflebase/tokens
description: Shared design tokens for Wafflebase (palette, semantic colors, radius, typography)

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.build.cjs.json && node -e "require('node:fs').writeFileSync('dist/cjs/package.json', '{\"type\": \"commonjs\"}\n')" && tsx scripts/build-css.ts
